zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogerson是William Rogerson和Margaret Rogerson的女兒，於1484年出生在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德。她於大約1520年與William Offley在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年51歲，埋葬在英國爾切斯特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogerson是William Rogerson和Margaret Rogerson的女儿，于1484年出生在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德。她于大约1520年与William Offley在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年51岁，埋葬在英国爾切斯特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Rogerson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Roger + -son.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogerson was born in 1484, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England as the daughter of William Rogerson and Margaret Rogerson. She married William Offley about 1520, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1535, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogerson est née en 1484, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fille de William Rogerson et Margaret Rogerson. Elle a épousé William Offley environ 1520, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1535, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1520 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England William Offley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1535 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogersonは1484年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでWilliam RogersonとMargaret Rogersonの娘として生まれた。約1520年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでWilliam Offleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで51歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスタースト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, En: 영국 체실르 체스터 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogerson(은)는 1484년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 William Rogerson(와)과 Margaret Rogerson의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 William Offley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogerson nasceu em 1484, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra filha de William Rogerson e Margaret Rogerson. Ela casou-se com William Offley aproximadamente 1520, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1535, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, En: ст питир'с чурч, честир, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rogerson родилась в 1484 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали William Rogerson и Margaret Rogerson. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Offley около 1520 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1535 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, честир, чешир, Англия.
